hero.title: Bring outside self-knowledge into 2nd-Brain
hero.subtitle: Other assistants · test results · notes
hero.speech: Pasted material is sorted first, then saved only when you confirm.

promptCard.title: Copy questions for another assistant
promptCard.description: If another assistant already knows your context, paste these questions there. Then bring its reply back here.
promptCard.copyHint: Copies the import questions to the clipboard.

pasteCard.title: Reply or test result
pasteCard.description: Paste the reply, a past disposition or personality test result, or notes about you. 2nd-Brain will sort and tag it into your structure.
pasteCard.sortHint: Sorts the pasted material before saving.

toast.promptPlaced: The questions were placed below. Long-press to copy them.
toast.saveFailed: Couldn't save it. The sorted result is still here; please try again.
toast.storagePending: Saved. The backup file copy didn't upload this time; your text is kept safely.

result.title: Imported record
result.degraded: Deep sorting was unavailable, so this is a basic local pass. Try again for a richer sort.
result.keepHint: Saves this imported result to your records.

saved.title: Saved
saved.body: Your center and SecondB can now draw on these records.
saved.moreHint: Clears this import and starts another one.

health.consentNeeded: Opt in to bring activity in
health.minorLocked: Activity sync is off for this account.
